props.name: heading
props.description: Sets the heading text.

props.name: headingSize
props.description: Sets the heading size of the accordion container heading.

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Sets the position of the expand/collapse icon.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the accordion.

props.name: open
props.description: Sets the state of the accordion container open or closed.

props.name: secondaryText
props.description: Sets secondary text displayed alongside the heading.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the accordion is opened or closed. Receives the new open state as a boolean.

slots.name: headingContent
slots.description: Sets content rendered within the accordion heading, alongside the heading text.
